changeSet.author: openelis-bioanalytical-fix
changeSet.comment: Remove incorrect bioanalytical page role assignments

changeSet.author: openelis-bioanalytical-fix

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Bioanalytical Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 1

changeSet.comment: Add role restrictions for Sample Reception per permission matrix

column.name: notebook_page_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT np.id FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Bioanalytical Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 1)

column.name: notebook_page_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT np.id FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Bioanalytical Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 1)

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Bioanalytical Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 3

column.valueComputed: (SELECT np.id FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Bioanalytical Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 3)

column.name: notebook_page_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT np.id FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Bioanalytical Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 3)

column.name: notebook_page_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT np.id FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Bioanalytical Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 3)

changeSet.author: openelis-bioanalytical-fix

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Bioanalytical Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND (np.page_title ILIKE '%result%' OR np.page_title ILIKE '%entry%' OR np.page_order = 3)

changeSet.comment: Add role restrictions for Result Entry per permission matrix

column.name: notebook_page_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT np.id FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Bioanalytical Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 3 LIMIT 1)

changeSet.author: openelis-bioanalytical-fix

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Bioanalytical Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 4

changeSet.comment: Add role restrictions for Post-Test Storage & Archiving per permission matrix

column.valueComputed: (SELECT np.id FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Bioanalytical Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 5)
